vocab.meaning: gương cầm tay nhỏ (thường có nắp đậy)
vocab.example: I always keep a small compact mirror in my bag for quick touch-ups throughout the day.

vocab.meaning: một sự bổ sung cồng kềnh/vướng víu
vocab.example: I find carrying a physical mirror to be a cumbersome addition to my everyday carry, so I rarely bring one.

vocab.meaning: tự ti/lo lắng về vẻ bề ngoài của mình
vocab.example: I’m not particularly self-conscious about my look, so I don't feel the need to carry a mirror everywhere.

vocab.meaning: khi đang di chuyển/đang ở bên ngoài
vocab.example: Having a tiny mirror is quite handy for on-the-go grooming before an important meeting.
In this digital age, I usually just use the front-facing camera on my phone as a makeshift mirror.

vocab.meaning: sự phù phiếm/quá trau chuốt vẻ bề ngoài quá mức
vocab.example: I try to avoid carrying one because I don't want to succumb to excessive vanity by checking my face every five minutes.
I only take a mirror with me when I have a formal event to ensure I stay presentable all evening.

vocab.meaning: chỉnh sửa diện mạo khẩn cấp
vocab.example: A pocket mirror is essential for emergency grooming, like checking if there’s something stuck in your teeth.
I prefer space-saving gadgets, so I'd rather use a reflective phone case than carry a separate mirror.

vocab.meaning: tỉ mỉ/kỹ lưỡng về cái gì đó
vocab.example: People who are meticulous about their makeup usually never leave the house without a high-quality portable mirror.
